underlying_goal: Understand if Claude for Mac plugins (Legal, Finance, etc.) are available in Claude Code terminal, and how to use equivalent functionality
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly misunderstood what the user meant by plugins (confusing Claude for Mac app plugins with Claude Code plugins) and took many turns to grasp the distinction.
brief_summary: User wanted to know if Claude for Mac themed plugins (Legal, Finance, etc.) work in Claude Code terminal; after several misunderstandings Claude clarified they are separate apps with different plugin systems.
